snippet.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
No line holds forever.

October 23, 2026.

https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4

War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control.

Developed by Infinity Ward, Modern Warfare 4 pushes the series into darker and more dangerous territory, where consequence and escalation bring long-running storylines to a powerful and emotional breaking point. Campaign drops players into trench warfare in Korea, close-quarters combat in New York, high-octane chases through Paris, SAS night raids in Mumbai, and city-wide assaults to reclaim occupied territory. Multiplayer delivers grounded, precise combat where fluid movement, player choice, and greater control define every engagement. In DMZ, players operate as an off-the-books asset behind enemy lines, where every extraction run into contested territory forces hard choices about which objectives to pursue, what to secure, and when to get out.

Prime Video India Presents
The Pyramid Scheme Official Trailer 
Starring Paramvir Cheema, Ranvir Shorey, Annjan Srivastav, Shekhar Suman, Ashish Raghav, Alfiya Jafri, Akhilendra Mishra, Smita Bansal, Indresh Malik, Sushant Singh

About:
The Pyramid Scheme follows the story of Goldy, an ambitious but impatient young man, whose quest to get rich through a pyramid marketing business spirals into a rollercoaster of chaos - risking not just his future, but also the love and trust of his close-knit joint family.

On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: In the Hand of Dante | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In the Hand of Dante follows the parallel lives of a New York author (Nick Tosches) in the 21st century who embarks on a violent journey after he is recruited by a mafia don to steal Italian poet Dante Alighieri’s The Divine Comedy written in the poet’s own hand, and Dante in the 14th century seeking inspiration to write his most important work – each man unknowingly connected through time and their obsessive quest for love, beauty, and the divine.

Directed by Julian Schnabel, starring Oscar Isaac, Gal Gadot, Gerard Butler, John Malkovich, Louis Cancelmi, Sabrina Impacciatore, Franco Nero, Benjamin Clementine, Paolo Bonacelli, Martin Scorsese, Al Pacino and Jason Momoa.

IN THE HAND OF DANTE, on Netflix June 24.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/inthehandofdante

snippet.title: SKYRIM IS A PERFECTLY BALANCED GAME WITH NO EXPLOITS - How To Break Sneak And Steal Everything
snippet.description:
Skyrim Is A Perfect Game With Absolutely No Bugs, Glitches And Exploits! You see everything in this game was created by todd howards very own hands and as a result there is no possible way that he would leave in a system by which a player could max level sneak in the helgen tutorial, escape into the wilderness and acheive a level of stealth, sneak and muffle that makes them undetectable by the NPCs? We have effectively made the ultimate stealth being, a secret agent like agent 47 from hitman but instead with much more fragile bones. It does feel rather apt to be doing a stealth focused video with the release of the new 007 game. Still who needs new games when you have The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Anniversary Edition!!!

Anyway in the following video The Spiffing Brit will do what he does best and that is of course breaking games using the power of funny bugs, overpowered glitches and exploits that turn even an impossible challenge into a walk in the park. Todays video will feature levelling exploits, fortify restoration enchanting loops and much much more on our quest to make a character achieve the highest possible sneak.

snippet.title: We Went in COMPLETELY Blind! | First Time Watching Project Hail Mary Reaction
snippet.description:

-----
Bonus Action (pReview'd's DnD Actual Play Show): https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMWISxq39GTafF2_xkXaKOw
pReview'd Gaming Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFln_0Sjdel34_VhFIgejvQ

Adam and Jay from pReview'd take a thrilling leap into the unknown with a first-time viewing of Project Hail Mary. They avoided all trailers and spoilers, and went in completely blind, to experience every twist of this sci-fi epic fresh. Throughout the video, they dive deep into the film's "hard science" elements, marvel at the incredible practical effects used to bring the alien Rocky to life, and celebrate the heartwarming "Space Bro" bond that forms between Ryland Grace and his Eridian counterpart. From the intense physics of space travel to the emotional weight of a high-stakes suicide mission to save Earth, the duo provides an engaging and humorous breakdown that highlights why going in blind makes for the ultimate cinematic experience.

Throughout the video, they dive deep into the film's "hard science" elements, marvel at the incredible practical effects used to bring the alien Rocky to life, and celebrate the heartwarming "Space Bro" bond that forms between Ryland Grace and his Eridian counterpart. From the intense physics of space travel to the emotional weight of a high-stakes suicide mission to save Earth, the duo provides an engaging and humorous breakdown that highlights why going in blind makes for the ultimate cinematic experience.
